---
title: "Untitled"
output: html_document
---

## Conections between species and metabolites

```{R}
library(dplyr)

df_name_cid <- read.csv("/home/gbiuser/Documents/vitoria/usp-masters/1-gutmgene/data/all_name_cid.csv")

load("/home/gbiuser/Documents/vitoria/usp-masters/1-gutmgene/data/gutmgenem_processed.RData")

# Get the row indices where CID is NA
na_rows <- is.na(gutmgene_m$Metabolite_CID)

# Look up the CID from the other dataframe using the metabolite name
gutmgene_m$Metabolite_CID[na_rows] <- 
  df_name_cid$CID[match(gutmgene_m$Metabolite_Name[na_rows], df_name_cid$name)]

edges_species_met <- data.frame(
                            Source = gutmgene_m$Microbe_Species,
                            Target = gutmgene_m$Metabolite_CID)
# Save information about species and metabolites nodes

nodes <- data.frame(name = unique(c(edges_species_met$Source, edges_species_met$Target)),
                      type = c(rep("Species", length(unique(edges_species_met$Source))), rep("Metabolite", length(unique(edges_species_met$Target)))))
```

## Conections between targets and metabolites

```{R}
load("targets_metabolites_all.RData")

edges_target_met <- do.call(rbind, lapply(names(targets_to_metabolites_all), function(gene) {
  data.frame(
    Source = rep(gene, length(unique(targets_to_metabolites_all[[gene]]))),
    Target = unique(targets_to_metabolites_all[[gene]]),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}))

# Save information about gene and metabolite nodes
nodes <- rbind(nodes, data.frame(
  name = unique(c(edges_target_met$Source, edges_target_met$Target)),
  type = c(rep("Gene", length(unique(edges_target_met$Source))), rep("Metabolite", length(unique(edges_target_met$Target))))
))
```


## Connections between species and MDD

```{R}
# install.packages("jsonlite")
library(jsonlite)
library(stringr)
library(dplyr)

disbiome.JSON <- fromJSON("species_mdd.json")
disbiome_df <- as.data.frame(disbiome.JSON)
disbiome_df <- disbiome_df %>%
                        mutate(species = word(organism_name, 1))

edges_species_mdd <- data.frame(
                            Source = unique(disbiome_df$species),
                            Target = rep("MDD", length(unique(disbiome_df$species))))

# Save information about species and MDD nodes
nodes <- rbind(nodes, data.frame(
                          name = edges_species_mdd$Source,
                          type = rep("Species", length(unique(edges_species_mdd$Source)))
              ))
nodes <- rbind(nodes, data.frame(
                            name = "MDD",
                            type = "Disorder"
                        ))
```

## Conections between MDD and KEGG, and MDD and Reactome

```{R}
library(stringr)

mdd_kegg_react <- read.table("mdd_kegg_react.csv", sep = ",", header = TRUE)

mdd_kegg <- mdd_kegg_react[str_detect(mdd_kegg_react$Pathway.ID, "KEGG"),]$Pathway.ID
mdd_kegg <- toupper(str_remove(mdd_kegg, "KEGG:"))

mdd_react <- mdd_kegg_react[str_detect(mdd_kegg_react$Pathway.ID, "REACT"),]$Pathway.ID
mdd_react <- toupper(str_remove(mdd_react, "REACT:"))

edges_mdd_kegg <- data.frame(
                        Source = rep("MDD", length(mdd_kegg)),
                        Target = mdd_kegg)
edges_mdd_react <- data.frame(
                        Source = rep("MDD", length(mdd_react)),
                        Target = mdd_react)
edges_mdd_pathways <- rbind(edges_mdd_kegg, edges_mdd_react)

nodes <- rbind(nodes, data.frame(
                        name = unique(edges_mdd_pathways$Target),
                        type = rep("Pathway", length(unique(edges_mdd_pathways$Target)))
              ))
```

## Conections between genes and KEGG

```{R}
targets_dir <- "targets"

files <- list.files(targets_dir, full.names = TRUE)

edges_target_kegg <- list()
edges_target_react <- list()

for (f in files) {
  
  fname <- basename(f)
  
  # extrai gene do nome do arquivo (antes do _kegg ou _react)
  gene <- sub("_(kegg|react)\\..*$", "", fname)
  gene <- toupper(gene)
  
  if (grepl("_kegg", fname)) {
    df <- tryCatch(read.table(f, sep = "\t", header = FALSE), error = function(e) NULL)
    
    edges_target_kegg[[gene]] <- data.frame(
      Source = gene,
      Target = toupper(df$V1),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    
  } else if (grepl("_react", fname)) {
    
    df <- tryCatch(read.csv(f, sep = ",", header = TRUE), error = function(e) NULL)
    
    if (is.null(df) || nrow(df) == 0 || !"Pathway.identifier" %in% colnames(df)) {
      message(paste("Sem Reactome para", gene))
      next
    }
    
    edges_target_react[[gene]] <- data.frame(
      Source = gene,
      Target = toupper(df$Pathway.identifier),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }
}

# junta tudo
edges_target_kegg <- do.call(rbind, edges_target_kegg)
edges_target_react <- do.call(rbind, edges_target_react)

# adiciona nĂłs (sem duplicar)
all_targets <- unique(c(edges_target_kegg$Target, edges_target_react$Target))

nodes <- rbind(
  nodes,
  data.frame(
    name = all_targets,
    type = "Pathway",
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
)
```

## Get all the edges and node type, clean and save

```{R}
edges <- rbind(edges_target_met, edges_target_react, edges_target_kegg, edges_mdd_pathways, edges_species_mdd, edges_species_met)

edges_clean <- edges %>%
  # mutate(across(everything(), ~ gsub("MDD", "TDM", .x))) %>%
  mutate(
    Source = sub("\\.$", "", Source),
    Target = sub("\\.$", "", Target)
  ) %>%
  distinct(Source, Target, .keep_all = TRUE)

order <- c("Pathway", "Gene", "Species", "Disorder", "Metabolite")
nodes_clean <- nodes %>%
  mutate(layer = as.numeric(factor(type, levels = order))) %>%
  mutate(name = sub("\\.$", "", name)) %>%  
  distinct(name, .keep_all = TRUE)          

# nodes_clean$layer[nodes_clean$name == "MDD"] <- 5
# nodes_clean$name[nodes_clean$name == "MDD"] <- "TDM"
```

```{R}
# Save
write.table(edges_clean, file = "./edges.tsv", row.names=FALSE, sep="\t", quote = FALSE)
write.table(nodes_clean, file = "./nodes.tsv", row.names=FALSE, sep="\t", quote = FALSE)
```
